source: Daggerheart SRD 1.0, Beastform Sheets, pp. 10-13 (Darrington Press Community Gaming License)

features.name: Agile
features.text: Your movement is silent, and you can spend a Hope to move up to Far range without rolling.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Companion
features.text: When you Help an Ally, you can roll a d8 as your advantage die.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Elusive Prey
features.text: When an attack roll against you would succeed, mark a Stress and roll a d4. Add the result to your Evasion against this attack.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Hobbling Strike
features.text: On a successful Melee attack, mark a Stress to make the target temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Pack Hunting
features.text: When you attack the same target as an ally who acted immediately before you, add a d8 to your damage roll.

features.name: Aquatic
features.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

features.name: Fragile
features.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

features.name: Venomous Bite
features.text: On a successful Melee attack, the target becomes temporarily Poisoned and takes 1d10 direct physical damage each time they act.

features.name: Webslinger
features.text: Create strong webbing that supports one creature, or temporarily Restrain a target within Close range with a successful Finesse Roll.

features.name: Armored Shell
features.text: Gain resistance to physical damage. Mark an Armor Slot to retract and further reduce physical damage by your Armor Score, but you cannot perform other actions while retracted.

features.name: Cannonball
features.text: Mark a Stress so an ally can launch you at a Close target for d12+2 physical damage using their Proficiency; spend a Hope to hit a second nearby target for half damage.

features.name: Rampage
features.text: When a damage die rolls 1, roll a d10 and add it. Before an attack, mark a Stress for +1 Proficiency on that attack.

features.name: Thick Hide
features.text: Gain +2 to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: Carry up to two willing allies when you move.

features.name: Trample
features.text: Mark a Stress to move in a straight line up to Close range and attack all targets along it; successful targets take d8+1 physical damage and become temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Venomous Strike
features.text: Attack any number of targets within Very Close range; successful targets become temporarily Poisoned and take 1d10 direct physical damage whenever they act.

features.name: Warning Hiss
features.text: Mark a Stress to force targets within Melee range back to Very Close range.

features.name: Fleet
features.text: Spend a Hope to move up to Far range without rolling.

features.name: Takedown
features.text: Mark a Stress to enter Melee and attack; on success gain +2 Proficiency for the attack and the target marks a Stress.

features.name: Bird's-Eye View
features.text: Fly at will. Once per rest while airborne, ask the GM a question about the scene below; the first roll using that information gains advantage.

features.name: Hollow Bones
features.text: Take -2 to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: Carry up to two willing allies when you move.

features.name: Vicious Maul
features.text: On a successful attack, spend a Hope to make the target temporarily Vulnerable and gain +1 Proficiency for the attack.

features.name: Physical Defense
features.text: Gain +3 to your damage thresholds.

features.name: Snapping Strike
features.text: On a successful Melee attack, spend a Hope to make the target temporarily Restrained and Vulnerable.

features.name: Bird's-Eye View
features.text: Fly at will. Once per rest while airborne, ask the GM a question about the scene below; the first roll using that information gains advantage.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: Carry up to two willing allies when you move.

features.name: Aquatic
features.text: Breathe and move naturally underwater.

features.name: Vicious Maul
features.text: On a successful attack, spend a Hope to make the target Vulnerable and gain +1 Proficiency for the attack.

features.name: Evolved
features.text: Choose a Tier 1 Beastform. Retain its traits and features, add +6 damage, +1 to its trait, and +2 Evasion.

features.name: Hybrid Features
features.text: Mark an additional Stress. Choose two Tier 1-2 forms and take four advantages and two features from them.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: Carry up to four willing allies when you move.

features.name: Demolish
features.text: Spend a Hope to move up to Far in a straight line and attack all targets along it for d8+10 physical damage; successful targets become temporarily Vulnerable.

features.name: Undaunted
features.text: Gain +2 to all damage thresholds.

features.name: Devastating Strikes
features.text: When you deal Severe damage in Melee, mark a Stress to make the target mark an additional Hit Point.

features.name: Massive Stride
features.text: Move up to Far range without rolling and ignore rough terrain when your size permits.

features.name: Carrier
features.text: Carry up to three willing allies when you move.

features.name: Deadly Raptor
features.text: Fly at will and move up to Far as part of your action. After a straight-line charge from at least Close range, reroll damage dice below your Proficiency.

features.name: Ocean Master
features.text: Breathe and move naturally underwater. A successful Melee attack can temporarily Restrain its target.

features.name: Unyielding
features.text: When you would mark an Armor Slot, roll a d6; on 5+, reduce severity without marking it.

attack.damage: +9 and one die size to base form

features.name: Evolved
features.text: Choose a Tier 1-2 form. Retain it, add +9 damage, +2 to its trait, +3 Evasion, and increase its damage die one size.

features.name: Hybrid Features
features.text: Mark 2 additional Stress. Choose three Tier 1-3 forms and take five advantages and three features from them.
